summary: Frontend testing completed for new dataset feature. TV Shows dataset removed, replaced with Customer Churn (1000 rows, 15 cols) and Customer Segmentation (800 rows, 13 cols). All 5 sample datasets display correctly. CSV files load via fetch from /datasets/ path. Training on Customer Churn with target=churned works successfully.

issues: Domain detection shows 'Financial / Credit Analysis' for Customer Churn - could be more specific like 'Customer Churn / Telecom'

passed_tests: TV Shows dataset card no longer exists
5 sample dataset cards appear: Loan Approval, House Prices, Insurance Costs, Customer Churn, Customer Segmentation
Customer Churn (sample-dataset-3): loads 1000 rows x 15 columns
Customer Churn CSV visible in textarea after loading
Customer Churn has 'churned' as target column (binary: 0/1)
Customer Churn has numeric columns: monthly_charges, tenure_months, total_charges, support_tickets, senior_citizen
Customer Churn has categorical columns: contract, gender, internet_service, payment_method, etc.
Customer Segmentation (sample-dataset-4): loads 800 rows x 13 columns
Customer Segmentation has no obvious binary target (suitable for unsupervised/clustering)
Customer Segmentation has columns: age, gender, annual_income, spending_score, etc.
Inline datasets still work: Loan Approval (20 rows), House Prices (15 rows), Insurance (20 rows)
Train model on Customer Churn with target=churned - training completes successfully (65% accuracy with Decision Tree)
Dataset Summary shows domain detection (Financial / Credit Analysis)
No missing values in Customer Churn dataset
No missing values in Customer Segmentation dataset
No duplicate rows in either dataset
critical_code_review_comments: loadSampleDataset async handler correctly fetches CSV from /datasets/ path for file-based datasets
sampleDatasets array correctly defines 5 datasets: 3 inline (data property) + 2 file-based (file property)
Grid layout uses lg:grid-cols-3 for 5 datasets (3 columns on large screens)
Customer Churn has realistic churn patterns with mix of numeric and categorical features
Customer Segmentation suitable for clustering with 10 numeric and 3 categorical features
seed_data_creation: Created test users during Playwright testing for authentication
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dataset feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) 5 sample datasets available in Analysis tab. 2) Customer Churn (1000 rows, 15 cols) loads from /datasets/customer_churn.csv. 3) Customer Segmentation (800 rows, 13 cols) loads from /datasets/customer_segmentation.csv. 4) Inline datasets (Loan Approval, House Prices, Insurance) still work. 5) Training on Customer Churn with target=churned works. 6) Both new datasets have zero missing values and zero duplicates.
